noticia.titulo: Corbin Bernsen Talks About The Yeti with Horror News
noticia.texto_resumido: We recently had the opportunity here at HorrorNews.net to virtually sit down with versatile, prolific actor Corbin Bernsen, whose career spans over three decades, and his iconic roles are definitely cause for mention, with portrayals of names like Arnie Becker (“LA Law), Roger Dorn (The “Major League” franchise), and as “The Dentist” for us horror … The post Corbin Bernsen Talks About The Yeti with Horror News appeared first on Horror News | HNN .
